decision: SQLite FTS5 search for Gathering — pod-local, explicit annotations, collection-level visibility, write-time indexing, derived view

steps.action: Draft FTS5 schema and extraction pipeline doc
steps.notes: FTS5 schema doc drafted: search_items + search_fts tables, extraction contract (title/description/tags/album), permission post-filter (collection-level visibility IN clause), sync rebuild trigger (derived view, rebuild after Fuseki sync), edge cases documented. Brief sent to Silas for sync safety review.

steps.action: Review schema for sync safety and reindex edge cases
steps.notes: Schema approved. Sync determinism: no concern (atomic writes). Reindex during query: no lock needed (WAL mode, <1s window). Cross-pod: structurally sound, note pod-level ACLs needed for multi-pod. One optimization: parallel triggers from index completion (search extraction + reconciliation), don't chain sequentially.

steps.action: Build search service — photos collection first
steps.notes: SearchIndexService (SQLite FTS5) + SearchHandler + search.ejs shipped. Write-time indexing wired into photo harvester. Routes: GET /search, GET /api/search, GET /api/search/stats. Build clean.

steps.action: Document search pattern in product docs
steps.notes: Search pattern documented in projects.md. Key design: pod-local FTS5, explicit annotations only, write-time indexing, derived view (rebuilt on sync), collection-level visibility post-filter. Photos first, expand to books/music next. Same proven pattern as Chorus context index.
